scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n frontend,backend,tauri -c bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:tauri"
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:sidecar --workspace=desktop && npm run tauri:build --workspace=desktop
